chapter_title.en: The Reward of one who Feeds a Believer, Quenches his Thirst, Clothes him or Pays off his Debt

text: 159 - عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام أنه قال: شبع أربعة من المسلمين يعدل رقبة من ولد إسماعيل (ع).

en.muhajir-b-ali: 159. It has been narrated that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: Feeding four Muslims is equal to freeing a slave from the descendants of Prophet Ishmael.
